adapter_restrictions: load bytes identified by the exact repository, git_commit_oid, git_blob_oid, and path
verify the source file SHA-256 recorded in canonical_sampling_function_provenance
do not reimplement or intercept random.Random, seed expansion, shuffle, bucket order, draw loop, or final sort
do not reorder the immutable resolved-condition sequence before the canonical call
execute twice on identical input and require the same selected condition-ID sequence

functions.name: build_pass1_sample
functions.signature: build_pass1_sample(resolved_conditions: Sequence[ConditionRecord], sample_size: int = DEFAULT_PASS1_SAMPLE_SIZE, seed: int = DEFAULT_SEED) -> List[ConditionRecord]

invariants: Source D commits both outputs and detached provenance before Source B first-open
no Source B value or hash influences Source D output bytes
destination hash fields are excluded from their own projections
source_b_prohibition: No Source B/A/C bytes, hashes, rows, manifests, request plans, replay outputs, filesystem handles, environment handles, subprocess handles, or network handles enter the pure regeneration function.

algorithm: require the exact closed nested p0_projection
require P0_CLEAR, count 39693, and all three contract versions
reject flattened aliases, missing fields, coercion, defaults, and extras
steps.name: validate_p0

algorithm: require condition_id, nb_eligible, nb_subclass, nb_contract_version
nb_eligible accepts bool or exact text True/False only
reject duplicate condition IDs
retain eligible oriented subclasses and map condition_id to subclass
steps.name: validate_and_index_contract

algorithm: retain RESOLVED_SINGLE_WINNER rows in the oriented contract map
reject duplicate retained IDs, version mismatch, or subclass mismatch
carry resolved_at only; do not read winner identity
require total 39693 and exact subclass counts
steps.name: validate_and_join_resolution

algorithm: preserve physical rows and provenance ordinals; no deduplication
missing token/outcome is only None, float NaN, empty/whitespace, or case-insensitive nan/none
validate every nonmissing token and outcome through canonical_int
insert original stripped token strings into per-outcome sets
derive first-trade timestamp as minimum canonical parse_ts over every row in the condition, including rows skipped for token/outcome malformation
any traded_at parse failure stops
steps.name: index_trades_and_anchors

algorithm: require outcome keys exactly 0 and 1
require exactly one original stripped token string per outcome
compare selected strings numerically only after cardinality succeeds
numeric equality is unresolved; numeric inequality emits original strings unchanged
require resolved_pair_count + unresolved_pair_count = 39693
stop only when unresolved_pair_count*5 > 39693
steps.name: enumerate_token_pairs

algorithm: call pinned time_bucket for every resolved pair
any resolved_at parse failure maps to UNKNOWN and does not stop sampling
valid values map to UTC YYYYQq
steps.name: construct_time_buckets

algorithm: call pinned build_pass1_sample directly with immutable resolved sequence, 300, 20260628
require 300 unique IDs and 100 per subclass
the pinned function owns allocation, bucket order, one shared PRNG, shuffle, round-robin pop-last selection, and final sort
steps.name: construct_sample

algorithm: after sampling, canonical _safe_resolved_at parse failure becomes missing resolved anchor
invalid-reason precedence is missing first trade, missing resolved, nonpositive decision window, else null
preserve exact audit nanoseconds independently when exact parser succeeds
request bounds are floor(first_trade+3600) and ceil(resolved) only for eligible rows
steps.name: classify_decision_windows

algorithm: emit outcome 0 then 1 for each condition in final canonical order
emit exactly 600 token rows
filter query-eligible rows without reordering to exactly 496 request rows
require exactly 52 invalid conditions and 104 ineligible token rows
compute row and logical hashes only after row values are final
steps.name: emit_outputs
